block_01: Last week was a “Golden” one for Amazon. Investors loved the fact that Warren Buffet announced that his hedge fund, Berkshire Hathaway, has been purchasing shares of Amazon stock. Then, to top it all off, Yahoo Finance reported the spotting of a Golden Cross formation on the Stock chart.
block_02: A Golden Cross formation is when your short term Moving Average (MA), usually 50 day, crosses the long term MA, usually set at 200 day, in an upward motion. Analysts view this as a signal for a breakout for the stock.
block_03: If you would like to find out more, feel free to contact me.
